_doc: biology axis sub-SSOT — parent: ../_index.json (biology key). Created 2026-04-28 to host the hexa-weave domain (write-side multi-strand molecular design composition) under a new top-level biology axis. Distinct from the life axis (which carries clinical / agricultural / pharmacological domains); biology axis is for fundamental molecular-design and write-side composition systems.

_meta._category_name: molecular biology, write-side multi-strand design composition, proteome inverse-design
